_comment: Investigator methodology gate. Advisory by default (FLAG/NOTIFY). Verb-focused concepts.
dsl:
rule "new module - confirm reuse" priority 20
when
    sim(relation_type, "MODULE_CREATION") > 0.4
then
    flag("New module/component proposed - confirm no existing module already covers it (check exposes_api / depends_on).")
end

rule "architecture decision needs rationale" priority 15
when
    sim(relation_type, "ARCHITECTURE") > 0.4
    and evidence_count < 1
then
    notify("Architecture decision recorded without supporting evidence - add rationale or impact.")
end

rule "low-confidence capture needs confirmation" priority 10
when
    confidence < 0.5
then
    flag("Low-confidence auto-captured decision - confirm it.")
end
